rationale: Legacy mongos topology leaks servers; implementation resource leak, no specific SDAM spec rule contradicted.
ignoreUndefined option not applying to findOne methods; Node.js-specific API option bug, not a spec area violation.
Cleanup of functional tests to fix hanging with new test runner; internal test infrastructure cleanup, no spec behavior.
Remove mongodb-topology-manager dependency; build/dependency change, no spec involvement.
Find local mongo-orchestration path for test infrastructure; CI/test setup change, no spec behavior.
Connection leak when pool destroyed during initial connect; implementation resource leak, no specific CMAP spec rule cited.
Sharded tests marked with wrong topology label; internal test tagging bug, no spec behavior involved.
useUnifiedTopology fails to connect to replica set if secondary is down; implementation regression, no specific SDAM rule named as violated.
SDAM spec defines ServerDescription equality algorithm for debouncing; driver missing this required behavior.
Adding hint support to update; proactive spec rollout (Improvement linked to DRIVERS-751), driver not doing anything wrong yet.
Add SDAM test for debouncing topology description updates; adding spec test file per DRIVERS-760.
Legacy SDAM ReplSet topology reports incorrect topologyId in monitoring events; implementation bug, unclear if SDAM spec mandates specific topologyId value.
Servers not removed from unknownServers list causing memory leak; internal resource leak, not a specific SDAM spec rule violation.
Internal state machine for unified topology to prevent connections during shutdown; implementation refactor, no spec behavior.
BSON options not respected during client-side encryption; API ergonomics/implementation bug. CSFLE spec may not mandate specific BSON option passthrough behavior.
Unified topology fails to rediscover replica set nodes after they go down; implementation regression bug, no specific SDAM rule stated as violated.
SDAM spec table says Unknown servers in ReplicaSetNoPrimary should update description only; driver removes them instead.
Documentation improvement: choosing boilerplate connect code format; docs-only, no spec behavior involved.
Normalize internal state management across stateful types; internal refactor, no spec-defined behavior change.
Make cursorState a public API for change streams; API ergonomics feature request, not a spec conformance issue.
Missing arrayFilters method in bulk operations API; API gap/ergonomics, not clear this contradicts a specific spec rule.
useUnifiedTopology continuously emits close event when replica set member is down; implementation regression, no spec rule about event emission frequency.
MaxListenersExceededWarning from topologyDescriptionChanged event; Node.js event emitter leak, internal implementation bug.
Fix idleShutdownTimeoutSecs; thin description, unclear what's wrong. CSFLE-adjacent but insufficient detail.
Document design and rationale of unified topology; documentation only, no spec behavior.
isConnected() takes wrong code path with useUnifiedTopology; internal API bug, isConnected not a spec-defined behavior.
Unhandled error event when server is offline; Node.js event handling bug, no spec rule about error propagation to promise.
Client metadata incorrectly reports nodejs-core; internal metadata label, no spec rule mandating the specific string value.
Remove outdated Evergreen CI configurations; CI/build change, no spec behavior.
TransientTransactionError label applied outside transactions; spec requires label only within a transaction context.
Add API documentation for Field Level Encryption classes; docs-only improvement, no spec conformance issue.
Add prose test for explicit encryption with key alt name; adding a new test, not fixing incorrect driver behavior.
Improve build script for C Driver tarball URL handling; build/packaging change, no spec behavior.
CSFLE spec requires error when auto-encrypting with maxWireVersion < 8; driver not raising this required error.
Bulk write error returns incorrect index in WriteError for unordered writes; index remapping implementation bug, unclear if CRUD spec mandates exact index behavior.
Add corpus test for FLE BSON type encryption per DRIVERS-686; adding cross-driver spec test file per DRIVERS coordination ticket.
DNS seedlist spec says connection string options override TXT record options; driver not applying this override correctly.
Server selection timeout reported by user; thin description, appears to be a regression from useUnifiedTopology, no specific spec rule cited.
Stack overflow when connecting to uninitialized replica set with useUnifiedTopology; infinite recursion implementation bug, not a spec rule violation.
Promises never resolve after network interruption with useUnifiedTopology; implementation regression, no specific spec rule cited.
GitHub token for prebuild publishing; build/packaging credential management, no spec behavior.
Document and warn on deprecated events/options for unified topology; docs and deprecation warnings, no spec conformance issue.
Driver strips domain qualification from hostnames during SDAM discovery; C# mentioned as working but filing is about Node.js bug, not behavioral divergence.
DNS lookup IPv6 fallback to IPv4 fails on Windows 10; OS/networking implementation issue, no spec rule violated.
useUnifiedTopology always returns true for isConnected and suppresses reconnect events; implementation regression, isConnected not spec-defined.
Half-close socket bug on timed-out connections; network/socket implementation bug, no spec rule about socket teardown behavior.
Improve error message when driver can't connect to mongocryptd; UX/error message improvement, not a spec conformance issue.
Support both flag styles for mongocryptd idleShutdownTimeoutSecs; mongocryptd CLI option handling, not a driver spec conformance issue.
Allow connection establishment cancellation when pool destroyed; internal optimization, no specific CMAP spec rule violated.
Typo in variable name causes SRV polling interval to be zero, causing DNS spike; implementation typo, not a spec nonconformance.
